topic: F-RB-4 PASS — hammerhead-minimal 12-nt 4-state chemical-kinetics simulation, 6/6 deterministic criteria
verdict_detail: _python_bridge/module/ribozyme_kinetics_simulation.py (776 LOC, Python stdlib only) implements deterministic 4-state ODE for hammerhead-minimal 12-nt catalytic core. Sequence 5'-CUGAUGAGGCCG-3' (Symons 1981 13-nt minimal core with variable position dropped → σ(6)=12 exactly). 4 states: substrate-bound / TS / cleaved / product-released. RK4 primary + explicit Euler cross-check. Eyring TST k₂ = (kT/h)·exp(−ΔG‡/RT) with ΔG‡=21 kcal/mol; Turner-NN 16-dinucleotide subset for ΔG_bound/ΔG_cleaved.

n6_invariant.master_identity: σ·φ = 6·τ = J₂ = 24 (algebraic, J₂ pose-quotient at L4 deferred per stretch)

raw_91_c3_disclose: Sequence is illustrative trim of Symons 1981 13-nt minimal hammerhead core to 12-nt to satisfy σ(6)=12 exactly. Not fitted to any single-paper assay condition.

Turner 2010 NN params (16 dinucleotide subset, hard-coded) for ΔG_bound/ΔG_cleaved estimation — illustrative thermodynamic consistency check, not full RNA-folding integration (raw 9 stdlib only, no ViennaRNA/RNAfold).
k_cat ≈ 0.6/min canonical hammerhead range (Hertel/Uhlenbeck 1992-class); margin to Eigen-Hammes diffusion ceiling > 4 orders demonstrates substrate-binding rate well below diffusion limit.

J₂=24 transition-state pose-equivalence quotient (spec §6 EVOLVE L4) deferred to stretch — current MVP records master identity algebraically (σ·φ=24 and 6·τ=24) without explicit pose-canonicalization implementation.
(R2) preserved: cage_assembly_simulation.py and other audited bridges untouched; (R5) raw 9 stdlib only — no scipy/numpy/ViennaRNA.

raw_71_falsifiers.condition: kcat_KM exceeds Eigen-Hammes 1e9 ceiling under canonical params within 30d (would invalidate diffusion-limit margin claim)
J₂=24 pose-equivalence quotient implementation lands within 90d (closes L4 stretch)

falsifier_rename: F-RIBOZYME-N → F-RB-1..5 (cross-cutting cleanup applied per spec/.roadmap convention)
